elements.name: Description
texts:
Ballymacvany is in the Electoral Division of Pettigoe, in Civil Parish of Templecarn, in the Barony of Tirhugh, in the County of Donegal

Ballymacvany is not matched up to Logainm.ie yet.

Ballymacvany has an area of:

    3,206,216 m² / 320.62 hectares / 3.2062 km²
    1.24 square miles
    792.27 acres / 792 acres, 1 rood, 3 perches

Nationwide, it is the 4612th largest townland that we know about

Within Co. Donegal, it is the 402nd largest townland
